task_updates.executor_notes: Added `src/tools/video-editor/types/timeline-canvas.ts` with local `TimelineAction`, `TimelineRow`, `TimelineEffect`, and `TimelineCanvasHandle` definitions. Migrated the 11 video-editor files that imported xzdarcy timeline types to the new local types. Verification: `rg -l "@/tools/video-editor/types/timeline-canvas" src/tools/video-editor | sort` lists the 11 migrated files, `rg -n "import type .*@xzdarcy|from '@xzdarcy/timeline-engine'|TimelineState.*@xzdarcy/react-timeline-editor" src/tools/video-editor` returns no matches, and `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` exits 0.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: All 11 type-importing files now compile against the new local timeline-canvas types, and `timeline-data.ts` uses the local `TimelineEffect`. Zero xzdarcy type imports remain under `src/tools/video-editor`. The only remaining `@xzdarcy` references are the existing Timeline component and CSS value imports in `TimelineEditor.tsx`, which are handled in later batches.
